title: TD1 Personal Tax Credits Returns - Canada.ca
content:
## TD1 Personal Tax Credits Returns
- TD1 forms for 2026 for pay received on January 1, 2026 or later
- TD1 forms for 2025 for pay received on January 1, 2025 or later
- Payroll Deductions Online Calculator (PDOC), payroll tables, TD1s, and more
